fields.description: Only Public should be marked as primitive. All other access policies are user-defined and governed through access categories.
fields.label: Primitive Policy

fields.description: Optional metadata only. Not used for access enforcement. Enforcement key is policy_name.
fields.label: Access Level
fields.options:
Public
Customer Restricted
Internal
Role Restricted
Finance Restricted
HR Confidential
Admin Only

fields.description: Optional metadata only. Not used for access enforcement. Enforcement key is policy_name.
fields.label: Sensitivity
fields.options:
public
customer
operational
internal
financial
hr
confidential

fields.label: Legacy Rules Note
fields.options: These direct role/designation rules are retained for backward reference only. New Nexus access enforcement is resolved through Nexus Access Category and Nexus Identity Profile and Knowledge Profile.

fields.description: Legacy JSON array. Example: ["Accounts User", "Accounts Manager"]. New access control should use Nexus Identity Profile and Knowledge Profile.
fields.label: Allowed Roles

fields.description: Legacy JSON array. Deny overrides allow in the older direct policy model. New access control should use Nexus Identity Profile and Knowledge Profile.
fields.label: Excluded Roles

fields.description: Legacy JSON array. New access control should use Nexus Identity Profile and Knowledge Profile.
fields.label: Allowed Designations

fields.description: Legacy JSON array. New access control should use Nexus Identity Profile and Knowledge Profile.
fields.label: Excluded Designations
